verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Cast your burdens unto Jesus, for He cares for you 2x

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Higher, higher, higher, higher, higher, Higher, higher, lift Jesus higher!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cast your burdens unto Jesus, for He cares for you 2x Lower, lower, lower, lower, lower, Lower, lower, stamp Satan lower
